steps.title: Use the sample-size rule
steps.content: With the same survey method, the margin of error is inversely related to the square root of the sample size. Increasing the sample size makes the margin of error smaller.

steps.title: Compare the two samples
steps.content: The sample size doubles from $156$ to $312$, so the margin of error is multiplied by $$ \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} $$ This factor is less than $1$, so the margin of error will be lower. The answer is A.
